visa_types.name: Family Reunion
visa_types.documents_required:
Please compile the documents you need to submit with your application. We have prepared a checklist for each type of visa.
Family Reunion/Marriage in Germany (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945712/fba2c06701719ead13af5fb44a068fe0/d-visa-englisch-ehegattennachzug-eheschliessung-data.pdf)
Family Reunion of Children to Parents in Germany (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945714/2808da765c945cb63348ff4f59a4efa1/d-visa-englisch-kindernachzug-data.pdf)
Family Reunion to other family members (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945718/d7e622a7a2370661c4a4ae677404e981/d-visa-englisch-nachzug-sonstige-familienangehoerige-data.pdf)
Family Reunion to an unaccompanied minor refugee living in Germany (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945716/57e9bde439110d0198afc9cf89178cab/d-visa-englisch-nachzug-zum-umf-data.pdf)
Information about proof of basic language skills (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/2276770/2f6890d6bfe312a493b1c1b4b3cb039a/d-visa-merkblatt-sprachnachweis-data.pdf)
Please note that all copies of your documents have to be
- In A4 size
- Complete and readable
- Not stapled

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
National visa are issued for long-term stays for a particular purpose
Further information if available on the Embassy of Germany website (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/af-en/05-VisaEinreise/-/2005354)

## Visa Fees
Please note that applicants will also be charged a VFS service fee of Euro 38 per application (PKR 12,261) which must be paid in cash when you attend the visa application centre.

[Table:  Family Reunion]

## Documents Required
Please compile the documents you need to submit with your application. We have prepared a checklist for each type of visa.
Family Reunion/Marriage in Germany (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945712/fba2c06701719ead13af5fb44a068fe0/d-visa-englisch-ehegattennachzug-eheschliessung-data.pdf)
Family Reunion of Children to Parents in Germany (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945714/2808da765c945cb63348ff4f59a4efa1/d-visa-englisch-kindernachzug-data.pdf)
Family Reunion to other family members (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945718/d7e622a7a2370661c4a4ae677404e981/d-visa-englisch-nachzug-sonstige-familienangehoerige-data.pdf)
Family Reunion to an unaccompanied minor refugee living in Germany (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/1945716/57e9bde439110d0198afc9cf89178cab/d-visa-englisch-nachzug-zum-umf-data.pdf)
Information about proof of basic language skills (https://afghanistan.diplo.de/blob/2276770/2f6890d6bfe312a493b1c1b4b3cb039a/d-visa-merkblatt-sprachnachweis-data.pdf)
Please note that all copies of your documents have to be
- In A4 size
- Complete and readable
- Not stapled

## Photo Specifications
The photo must:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- no computer print-outs accepted
- be printed on high quality photo paper with high solution
- stapled to the application form at the intended spot
- be in colour
- be 35–40 mm in width
- be maximum 3 months old and resemble the applicant
- be taken with the applicant facing the camera directly, against a white background
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face must occupy 70–80 % of the picture.
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair must not cover the eyes.
Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses must not be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there must be no reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed, provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- chin, forehead and both cheeks must be clearly visible
- shadows on the face due to the head-dress are not allowed
Please find Samples  here

## Processing Time
The processing time of family reunion visa applications is on average four months.

## Download Forms
Click here (https://videx-national.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/#/videx-langfristiger-aufenthalt_) to download the application form.
Click here for the declaration form.
Click here (https://videx-national.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/#/videx-langfristiger-aufenthalt) for the Videx-form
